channel.title: Home on Tristan Abbott
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Tristan Abbott

item.title: In the media
item.description: In the media Coverage of work with Tim Cronin on aerosol impacts on convection: MIT news,phys.org,physicsworld,Radio-Canada (French)

item.title: Publications
item.description: Publications (CV) Abbott, T.H. and T.W. Cronin (2021), Aerosol invigoration of convection through increases in humidity, Science. [arxiv][journal] Abbott, T.H., T.W. Cronin and T. Beucler (2020), Convective Dynamics and the Response of Precipitation Extremes to Warming in Radiative–Convective Equilibrium, Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences. [arxiv][journal] Hausfather, Z., H.F. Drake, T.H. Abbott and G.A. Schmidt (2020), Evaluating the performance of past climate model projections, Geophysical Research Letters. [journal] Beucler, T., T.H. Abbott, T.
